problem id: cf1cca51
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHR(2)

examples:
  11101111 -> 00011011
  01111010 -> 00010100
  01011110 -> 00010100
  10111110 -> 00101101
  11101010 -> 00010000
  01110001 -> 00000000
  00000010 -> 00000000
  11100011 -> 00000000
  11101100 -> 00011001
  11011001 -> 00110010

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 00000001
